sections.paragraph:
- Original: ζιζάνιον

- Transliteration: Zizanion

- Phonetic: dziz-an'-ee-on

- Definition:

1. a kind of darnel, resembling wheat except the grains are black

- Origin: of uncertain origin

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Of uncertain origin; darnel or false grain: - tares.
